metoffice.title: Yellow warning of rain affecting South West England
metoffice.summary: Yellow warning of rain affecting South West England: Bournemouth Christchurch and Poole, Cornwall, Devon, Dorset, Plymouth, Somerset, Torbay valid from 1200 Mon 02 Feb to 0900 Tue 03 Feb

metoffice.title: Yellow warning of rain affecting South West England
metoffice.summary: Yellow warning of rain affecting South West England: Cornwall, Devon, Plymouth, Somerset, Torbay valid from 0900 Fri 30 Jan to 0600 Sat 31 Jan

heat.text: Little impact observed on health, healthcare services and social care provision. Business as usual.

cold.text:
There is potential for minor impacts across health and social care services, including:

  • increased use of healthcare services by vulnerable people
  • greater risk to life of vulnerable people
  • increased potential for indoor environments to become very warm

but these are not expected.
